body.title: Sweep: standalone Igor-wild-0001 → IGOR_NAME resolver (value-preserving)
body.intention: No live file hardcodes the instance name; instance identity comes from IGOR_NAME, still valued Igor-wild-0001 until the rename ticket.
body.description:
**Problem:** 'Igor-wild-0001' is hardcoded in ~238 tracked files beyond the DB URL (palace paths, table refs, session names, configs). Parameterize via the IGOR_NAME resolver — at the CURRENT value, so this is a pure behavior-preserving refactor.

**Shape:** Sweep standalone Igor-wild-0001 occurrences (those NOT inside the DB connection string, which the db-string sweep already handled) → IGOR_NAME resolver / ${IGOR_NAME}. Templates → placeholder. Lazy where applicable.

**Affected files:** the ~238 minus the URL-only ones; config/profiles/*, devices/igor/*, devlab/*, docs/* (HIGH-inertia config flagged for approval).
**Design rules:** behavior-preserving (value stays Igor-wild-0001); no-hardcoded-identity; lazy.
**Scope boundary:** IN — code/config references → resolver, value unchanged. OUT — changing the value (rename ticket); historical memory JSON/md (leave as-is; they're append-only records).
**Test plan:** services + tests behave identically (value unchanged) with IGOR_NAME=Igor-wild-0001 set; import-with-unset doesn't crash for touched modules.
**Completion criteria:** `git grep -l 'Igor-wild-0001' -- $(git ls-files | grep -vE '\.example$|\.template$|tests?/|runtime/memory/')` returns ZERO; suite green with IGOR_NAME set.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
[error] PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write): The skeleton must never depend on Postgres — skeleto — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-004 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write))
…and 37 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Added portable identity.instance_id() (IGOR_INSTANCE_ID override, call-time, total/canonical default); routed 8 behavioral baked-literal sites outside devices/igor/ to it (web_server/scraps/dicksimnel/claude/devlab x4). Proof c8010712 red=AssertionError green=passed. RESIDUAL Igor-wild-0001 in live files is BY DESIGN: audit_check_hardcoded_instance.py (the arbiter, scans devices/igor/) stays PASS — all devices/igor/ refs are the settled exempt canonical home (paths.py/node_id/docstrings); the literal also lives once in identity.instance_id() as the portable canonical default. Docstrings/templates/bootstrap-shell/UI-defaults left illustrative. NOT routed to igor_name() (raises; IGOR_INSTANCE_ID is the documented override tests set) nor paths().instance_id (device-coupling). Value-preserving on this box. Pre-existing integration failures (circuit_breaker/announce — live IMAP/skeleton) confirmed on clean baseline, not mine.
